verdict_summary: After #744 schema fix (editor + chat_info added), bot bubble still shows only indefinite loading dots — no Korean warning bubble, no Security Filter author label rendered after 50s. Same regression pattern as #726/#729.

evidence.console_errors_excerpt: Failed to load resource: the server responded with a status of 400 () /cdn-cgi/rum?:1 — Cloudflare RUM, unrelated to APF/add_turn flow. No other errors observed in 22 messages / 21 user msgs / 1 error / 19 info / 2 verbose.

recommendation: Schema fix from #744 analysis is INCOMPLETE or wrong fields/values. RRN is technically protected (no decode rendered = S2 still safe) but warning bubble injection still fails on new SPA bundle. Recommend: (a) re-capture HAR on this exact build to compare engine-emitted add_turn frame against legitimate frame BYTE-BY-BYTE (not just field list); (b) verify new fields are nested at the right path (candidates[0].editor vs candidates[0].editor{}); (c) check chat_info enum value — try 'TYPE_ONE_ON_ONE' AND raw int forms; (d) inspect ws frame header/sequence — bundle may require monotonic turn_id or seq; (e) check whether new bundle requires server-issued chat_info.chat_id forwarding from create_chat handshake. Consider escalating to dump SPA JS source map for ws message validator.
notes: Test executed at 16:11-16:13 KST. Used Delivery Guy (@Sun_pipipo) for fresh chat. Hard reload performed before test. DevTools Console open. PII prompt submitted at ~16:12; observed for 50s+ — bot bubble never progressed beyond '...' indicator. User PII bubble rendered correctly with author 'HealthyWorm4019' (own user). The bot reply slot appeared with author 'Delivery Guy' (character) and c.ai badge but content stayed at loading-dots-only. RRN 880101-1234567 NOT decoded/echoed by model anywhere — engine block still suppresses the upstream SSE stream (good — protective failure mode preserved). Issue is purely the warning-injection bubble failing to materialize. NOT escalating to FAIL_S2_regression because no RRN content leaked.
